summary: Tested new Profile/notifications feature + multi-landlord scrapers. Backend: 28/28 pytest pass (18 regression in test_hamburg_scanner.py + 10 new in test_profile.py incl. GET/PUT /api/profile, persistence, validation, /api/auth/me fields). Frontend: ProfilePage navigation from PROFIL button in StatusBar works, account email/role displayed, notification_email editable, checkbox toggles, save persists across reload, green-dot indicator on PROFIL button appears when notifications enabled. Dashboard still shows the 2 manual-URL apartments (€571.89 Bramfeld, €1296.59 Moorburg). Backend logs confirm SAGA + Vonovia + Deutsche Wohnen run sequentially with no Playwright concurrency errors (each returns 0 URLs - expected due to captchas).

minor.issue: Falls back notification_email to login email when unset - good UX, but a saved empty string would NOT fall back (only None). Edge case only.
If notification_email field is omitted or null, the existing value is preserved (only notifications_enabled is updated). Behavior is correct but undocumented; consider explicit clearing semantics.

One transient 'Target page, context or browser has been closed' error on the very first startup-time SAGA scrape (race during init). All subsequent scheduled runs are clean. Consider a small retry or guard.

integration_issues.issue: Possible timing issue when navigating from /profile back to / right after save: green-dot indicator may persist for a moment because back-button click can race with checkAuth() refresh. Reproduced once in Playwright (disable+save+back showed dot still ON). Suggest awaiting checkAuth() to complete before navigation, or refetch /api/auth/me in Dashboard on mount.

issues: Phosphor icons import uses 'EnvelopeSimple' - works, but ensure tree-shaking by importing from '@phosphor-icons/react/dist/ssr' if SSR'd later. Currently fine.

action_items: (Low) In ProfilePage handleSave, ensure `await checkAuth()` completes BEFORE allowing back-navigation, or have Dashboard call checkAuth on mount, so green-dot indicator on PROFIL button reflects latest state immediately.
(Low) Guard scrape_immomio_hamburg against startup race causing 'Target page closed' on the very first SAGA invocation (one-shot only).
(Carry-over from iter_2) Migrate @app.on_event to FastAPI lifespan, type=password for new-user input in AdminPanel, sync next_scan with backend after each scheduled scan.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileUpdate model: `notifications_enabled: bool = False` - if client sends only {"notification_email":...}, notifications_enabled will silently reset to False. Should be Optional[bool] = None with merge logic, or PATCH semantics.
PUT /api/profile returns 200 with `{**update_data}` but missing id/email - consider returning the full updated profile for client convenience.
Generic _scrape_landlord_pages: regex-only detection will miss Immomio links rendered post-hydration by JS. For Friendly-Captcha sites this is expected to return 0 - which it does.
scrape_immomio_hamburg correctly switched to sequential `await asyncio.to_thread(...)` calls inside one event loop - no concurrent sync_playwright contexts. Good.
Email loop: iterates users with notifications_enabled=true AND non-empty notification_email; also merges legacy global settings email. Correct.
Auth playbook compliance unchanged: bcrypt $2b$, httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookies, explicit CORS origin + credentials, idempotent seed_admin. OK.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (carry-over from iter_2).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (12/12 functional steps, 1 minor sync glitch on green-dot after disable)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_profile_* user created and deleted per fixture. Admin profile temporarily had notification_email='notify_e2e@example.com' / notifications_enabled=true during UI test; reset to maximnikityk@ukr.net / false at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New pytest module /app/backend/tests/test_profile.py covers GET/PUT /api/profile, persistence, validation (422 on bad email), /api/auth/me notification fields, plus regression spot-checks. Use admin_session/user_session fixtures pattern matching test_hamburg_scanner.py. SAGA/Vonovia/Deutsche Wohnen scrapers all return 0 URLs in this environment - that is EXPECTED (Friendly Captcha). Apartments come from manual URLs only (2 items). When testing UI green-dot toggle, ensure checkAuth() is fully awaited before navigating away from /profile.
rca of the issue: Green-dot sync: ProfilePage calls `await api.put('/api/profile', profile); await checkAuth(); toast.success(...)`. checkAuth() refetches /api/auth/me and setUser. React state update is async; if the user clicks Back immediately after the toast, AuthContext may still be in the process of re-rendering, so StatusBar reads stale `user.notifications_enabled=true`. Mitigation: either disable the Back button until checkAuth resolves, or have Dashboard call checkAuth() in a useEffect on mount.
